{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Cloud Hammer madra
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Cloud Hammer madra]] looks like mist but gives the spiritual impression of a great fortress wall.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Chon Ma]] uses dark gray [[Cloud Hammer madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
